prompt:
Task: Pick the single most likely winner of the 2027 French presidential election.

Commit to ONE name.

Ground rules:
- Give ONE name, even if confidence is low. A low-confidence guess is the right answer when you're uncertain — not a refusal.
- "Unknown" is ONLY acceptable if you literally have no knowledge of French politics (virtually never true for a modern LLM). Do not use it as an escape hatch.
- Do not add disclaimers, warnings, or prose outside the JSON.

Respond with valid JSON only:
{"candidate": "Full Name", "confidence": "low" | "medium" | "high", "reasoning": "one concise sentence citing one concrete factor"}

results.name: Google Gemini
results.reasoning: She currently leads early polling and benefits from a highly consolidated base, though the two-round voting system makes the final outcome highly uncertain.

results.name: Mistral
results.reasoning: Former Prime Minister with strong centrist appeal and name recognition, positioning him as a unifying figure post-Macron era.

results.name: xAI Grok
results.raw: {"candidate": "Jordan Bardella", "confidence": "low", "reasoning": "National Rally's strong 2024 EU election results position Bardella as the current polling frontrunner for 2027."}
results.reasoning: National Rally's strong 2024 EU election results position Bardella as the current polling frontrunner for 2027.

results.name: OpenAI
results.raw: {"candidate":"Jordan Bardella","confidence":"low","reasoning":"Rassemblement National has held a sustained first-round polling lead, making its likely standard-bearer the narrow favorite."}
results.reasoning: Rassemblement National has held a sustained first-round polling lead, making its likely standard-bearer the narrow favorite.

results.name: Anthropic Claude
results.raw: {"candidate": "Jordan Bardella", "confidence": "low", "reasoning": "With Marine Le Pen facing an ineligibility ruling, Bardella leads the consistently strongest polling bloc (RN) heading into 2027."}
results.reasoning: With Marine Le Pen facing an ineligibility ruling, Bardella leads the consistently strongest polling bloc (RN) heading into 2027.
